remarks: Beautifully Remodeled Townhouse Condo in a Prime New Canaan Location. Move right into this beautifully remodeled and impeccably maintained 3-bedroom townhouse condo, where style, comfort, and convenience come together. The flexible third bedroom is currently used as a home office, offering the perfect space for today's lifestyle. The inviting main level features a spacious living room and dining room, ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The updated kitchen is equipped with newer appliances and thoughtful finishes, making meal preparation a pleasure. Upstairs, you'll find two generously sized bedrooms, each with its own beautifully remodeled en-suite bathroom. Storage is abundant throughout, walk-in closets in the foyer and all three bedrooms.The newly finished lower level adds valuable living space and offers endless possibilities. Updated HVAC ,new air handler .Whether you envision a family room, recreation room, playroom, home gym, or media room, this versatile area easily adapts to your needs. Step outside to a private patio surrounded by mature landscaping, creating a peaceful, shaded retreat that's perfect for relaxing, entertaining, or enjoying your morning coffee. Ideally located within walking distance of vibrant downtown New Canaan, enjoy charming shops, exceptional restaurants, parks, and the Metro-North train station for an easy commute to New York City. This turnkey home combines modern updates, flexible living spaces, abundant storage. Its a must
